steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create worktree and task branch, record branch info, plan full step list.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0005, t0007, t0009, t0012 are completed and understand their outputs.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create canonical task folder tree (code, data, results, research, plan, assets, intervention, logs).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review the Poleg-Polsky 2016 paper (DOI 10.1016_j.neuron.2016.02.013) and any other DSGC compartmental-model papers already in the corpus for exact method details.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Find ModelDB 189347 download URL, Poleg-Polsky supplementary code, any errata, and sibling DSGC compartmental models in public repositories (ModelDB, GitHub, OSF).

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0005 (morphology), t0009 (calibrated radii), t0007 (NEURON install), and t0012 (scoring library) for exact interfaces and file formats the implementation will consume.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Plan module layout, port strategy, morphology swap procedure, tuning-curve simulation protocol, envelope verification, and Phase B sibling-model survey. Budget remains $0.00 (local only).

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: pure local NEURON compute; no remote machines needed.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Download ModelDB 189347, port as library asset, compile MOD files, swap in calibrated morphology, run 12-angle 20-trial tuning curve, score against envelope via t0012, then Phase B sibling-model survey.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines to tear down.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: reproduction task with a fixed published method; no exploratory variation within this task.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary, results_detailed, metrics.json (including efficiency metrics), costs.json, remote_machines_used.json, and tuning_curve CSVs.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Build a comparison table of reproduced vs published Poleg-Polsky 2016 values (DSI, peak, null, HWHM) and note any gaps beyond the envelope tolerances.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate 4-6 follow-up suggestions based on port outcome and Phase B survey.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Finalize task.json, run all verificators, write session logs, push, open PR, merge.
